name: Vendor Risk Level Assigned
description: All vendors should have a risk level assigned based on data access, criticality, and other factors
remediation: Assess the vendor's risk level based on the type of data accessed, service criticality, and security posture
remediation_steps: Review what data/systems the vendor has access to
Assess business criticality of the vendor relationship
Review vendor's security certifications and history
Assign risk level (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
